title: TRAFFIC ACCIDENT - ROAD CLOSURE
summary: Police are currently investigating a multi-vehicle traffic accident on Ferry Road between Limekiln Road and Pine Run Road. The roadway is currently closed and we will update once reopened.

summary: Thanks to everyone that came out and donated blood for the Red Cross Battle of the Badge's on May 7th.  The Red Cross announced that for the second year in a row, the Police Department had the most donors signing in!!  WPD sincerely appreciated all that showed up and...

title: Cell phone law - distracted driving
summary: Paul Miller's Law warning period is over June 6, 2026 ...... $50 fine plus court costs...... its not worth it, put the phones down while driving!
